ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suburbs" (
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each suburb */,
  "suburb_name" TEXT /* Name of the suburb */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the suburb's population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the suburb */,
  "median_weekly_income" INTEGER /* Median weekly personal income in the suburb */,
  "life_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Average life satisfaction score for the suburb */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "homeless_rate" REAL /* Rate of homelessness in the suburb */,
  "housing_stress_rate" REAL /* Rate of housing stress based on the 30-40 rule */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient for the suburb */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the suburb */,
  "ier_score" INTEGER /* Index of Education and Reading (IER) score for the suburb */,
  "nonreligious_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is non-religious */,
  "citizenship_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that holds citizenship */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* General sentiment score for the suburb */,
  "counts" INTEGER /* Count of some metric, likely related to data points or records */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state or territory the suburb is located in */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the suburb's geographical location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the suburb's geographical location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the suburb's data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the suburb's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_statistics" (
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient for the suburb */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the suburb */,
  "median_weekly_income" INTEGER /* Median weekly personal income in the suburb */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median weekly rent in the suburb */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is employed */,
  "average_household_income" REAL /* Average household income in the suburb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_statistics" (
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the suburb's population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the suburb */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "homeless_rate" REAL /* Rate of homelessness in the suburb */,
  "nonreligious_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is non-religious */,
  "citizenship_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that holds citizenship */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the suburb */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the suburb */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by age groups */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_statistics" (
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "life_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Average life satisfaction score for the suburb */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* General sentiment score for the suburb */,
  "counts" INTEGER /* Count of some metric, likely related to data points or records */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of crime in the suburb */,
  "healthcare_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of healthcare in the suburb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_statistics" (
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "ier_score" INTEGER /* Index of Education and Reading (IER) score for the suburb */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate in the suburb */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate in the suburb */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Enrollment rate in the suburb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_statistics" (
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "housing_stress_rate" REAL /* Rate of housing stress based on the 30-40 rule */,
  "average_house_price" REAL /* Average house price in the suburb */,
  "rental_vacancy_rate" REAL /* Rental vacancy rate in the suburb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_suburb_code FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_code") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the new version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the new version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_suburb_code FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_code") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "md5_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the file for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_suburb_code FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_code") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "suburb_code" TEXT /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "md5_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the file for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_suburb_code FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_code") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_code")
)
